detail: Story avfl-scan-profile approved for sprint sprint-2026-04-04
Gherkin spec generated for avfl-scan-profile: 17 scenarios
Team composition: Dev + QA. Single wave. No E2E or Arch Guard (additive config change).
AVFL checkpoint on sprint plan: 10 findings found and fixed (3 high, 4 medium, 3 low). Story and Gherkin specs corrected.
Sprint sprint-2026-04-04 activated — 1 story, 1 wave, team: Dev + QA

Sprint-planning E2E Validator heuristic too narrow: 'touches multiple system boundaries' missed skill-instruction behavioral changes. Proposed fix: also trigger E2E when change_type=skill-instruction and change modifies execution behavior (new modes, parameters, pipeline branches).
